original_image_tags: Reverse side of the document page, showing faded reverse text from the front side, a large red "CLASSIFIED" stamp, and a typed notation at the bottom.

elements.description: A page consisting entirely of typed text on paper, oriented upside-down. It features a large, mirrored 'RECEIVED' stamp at the bottom with the text 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'F B I', 'Apr 7 3 52 PM 1959', and 'MR. JONES'. There are also some black ink blots and a small, faint red stamp near the bottom right edge.

judge.reason: Description A describes a red 'CLASSIFIED' stamp while Description B describes a mirrored 'RECEIVED' stamp with specific text, which are contradictory claims about the same visual element.
